sentence_reviews.text: Approximations or structured sparsity reduce the memory and compute cost of all-pairs attention.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Self-attention, Algorithms & data structures.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Self-attention.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning provides background for attention mechanisms and neural sequence models.
sentence_reviews.notes: The edge rationale is defensible because these variants modify or approximate self-attention, but the source is broad rather than exact.
